meta.title: Vanisca — Mediterranean Restaurant in Agadir
meta.description: Refined Mediterranean cuisine in the heart of Agadir. Fresh pasta, seafood, premium meats and wood-fired pizzas in a warm, elegant setting. Reserve your table.
meta.keywords: Agadir restaurant, Mediterranean restaurant Agadir, seafood Agadir, pasta Agadir, pizza Agadir, Vanisca, book restaurant Agadir

hero.title: The art of Mediterranean dining
hero.subtitle: Generous, refined cuisine — from the freshest seafood to handmade pasta — in a setting of carved wood and warm copper in the heart of Agadir.

about.title: An exceptional culinary experience
about.body: At Vanisca, every dish is an invitation to journey across the Mediterranean. Our chefs elevate the freshest seafood, house-made pasta and carefully selected meats with uncompromising standards. In a space where carved wood meets the warm glow of copper, we offer far more than a meal — we offer a moment.

highlights.title: Our signatures
highlights.subtitle: A few must-tries from our menu

seafood.title: Seafood
seafood.desc: Prawns, calamari, octopus and fish grilled to perfection.

pasta.title: Pasta & Risotto
pasta.desc: Fresh pasta and creamy risottos with truffle and seafood.

pizza.title: Pizzas
pizza.desc: Thin crust and generous toppings, baked with care.

desserts.title: Desserts
desserts.desc: Tiramisu, San Sebastián cheesecake and indulgent fondants.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A generous, seasonal Mediterranean carte
menu.downloadNote: Prices are shown in Moroccan dirhams (DH).
